title: Personal Information Update - Current Student
content:
Personal Information Update - Current Student
Morgan State University - Office of the Registrar

This guide is for CURRENT STUDENTS. It explains how to update your personal information on file with the university.

---

STEP 1: GATHER REQUIRED DOCUMENTATION
No substitutions are accepted. You must provide the exact documents listed below.

Legal Name Change (requires 2 of the following):
- Marriage License
- Social Security Card
- Legal Name Change document
- Passport
- Driver's License
- Driver's Permit
- State ID
- Military ID
- Birth Certificate
- Divorce Papers

Date of Birth Change (requires BOTH):
- Valid government-issued photo ID
- Birth Certificate

Gender Change (requires 1):
- Valid government-issued photo ID

Social Security Number Change (requires BOTH):
- Valid government-issued photo ID
- Social Security Card

---

STEP 2: ENTER YOUR NAME
Enter your full name.

---

STEP 3: SELECT INFORMATION TO UPDATE

Updates available via this form:
- Legal Name
- Permanent address
- Date of birth
- Billing address
- Social security number
- Legal gender

Updates available via Websis Student Self-Service (not this form):
- Preferred name
- Gender identity
- Personal pronoun
- Mailing address
- Marital status
- Emergency contact

---

STEP 4: ATTACH REQUIRED DOCUMENTATION
Upload all required documents based on the type of change you selected in Step 3.

---

STEP 5: SUBMIT
Submit the form. Processing takes up to 3 business days.

For the full official guide with screenshots, view: [Personal Info Update - Current Student Guide](https://drive.google.com/file/d/1KKDuj6XyGxyTtPosl4fcloZIS-0wsdmT/view)
